parsed.production_notes: The video features real human actors in a natural setting with consistent lighting and organic movements, showing no signs of AI generation.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, straight black hair tied back from her face. She wears black-rimmed glasses and has a serious but expressive face.
characters.wardrobe: A red and white checkered long-sleeved shirt, a leopard-print scarf, and dark, vertically pinstriped trousers.
characters.demeanor: Authoritative and confident, using expressive hand gestures to emphasize her points while advising her friends.

characters.appearance: A young man of average build with short, dark hair. He is seen only from the back and is out of focus for the entire video.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue and white checkered long-sleeved shirt.

characters.appearance: A young man of average build with short, dark hair, wearing glasses. He is seen only from the back and is out of focus for the entire video.

scenes.setting: A simple, sparsely furnished room with plain, off-white walls, likely a small office or study. The lighting is bright and even. The color palette is neutral, dominated by the white walls and the characters' clothing.

panels.panel_visual_description: An over-the-shoulder medium shot focuses on Character A, a young South Asian woman, sitting in a black chair. She is centrally framed and actively speaking, using her hands to gesture. She is addressing two men, Character B and Character C, whose backs are to the camera in the soft-focus foreground. The setting is a plain room with off-white walls and a light switch visible behind her. The lighting is bright and direct, illuminating her clearly.

scenes.visual_description: A single, static over-the-shoulder shot shows a young woman (Character A) sitting and talking earnestly to two men (Characters B and C), who are seen from behind in the foreground. The entire video is presented in a vertical format. A red banner with white Hindi text is fixed at the top of the screen. Throughout her speech, animated purple and white captions appear sequentially at the bottom to highlight keywords.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: दो हफ्ते से तू मुझे दिन के 40 रील्स भेज रहा है। [For two weeks, you've been sending me 40 reels a day.]

Character A says: उसी टाइम में अगर इंग्लिश सीखते तो आज तुम्हारी जॉब लग गई होती। [If you had learned English in that time, you would have a job today.]

Character A says: मैं भी दिन भर रील देखती रहती थी। [I also used to watch reels all day.]

Character A says: मेरे साथ के लोग आगे निकल गए और मैं कच्चा बादाम ही देखती रह गई। [The people with me moved ahead, and I was left watching 'Kacha Badam'.]

Character A says: अपने टाइम की फिक्र करो तो फोन में तुम लोग बहुत कुछ सीख सकते हो। [If you worry about your time, you can learn a lot on your phone.]

Character A says: जैसे ये SpeakX ऐप ही देख लो। [For example, look at this SpeakX app.]

Character A says: इसमें AI इंग्लिश टीचर के साथ बात करके दो हफ्ते भर में ही फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलना सीख गई। [In this, by talking with an AI English teacher, I learned to speak fluent English in just two weeks.]

Character A says: अब मैं हर जगह हाई क्लास इंग्लिश बोल पा रही हूं। [Now I can speak high-class English everywhere.]

Character A says: और अब सब लोग मुझे बहुत इज्जत देते हैं। [And now everyone gives me a lot of respect.]

Character A says: आप लोग भी डिसाइड कर लो। [You guys should also decide.]

Character A says: आप लोगों को दिन भर रील चला के अपना टाइम बर्बाद करना है या SpeakX ऐप यूज करके समाज में इज्जत पानी है। [Do you want to waste your time watching reels all day, or use the SpeakX app to earn respect in society?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Top Banner: रील्स छोड़ो, दिन के 10 मिनट दो जल्दी फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलो। (Stop watching reels, give 10 minutes a day and speak fluent English quickly.)

Animated Captions (appear sequentially): 2 HAFTE, USI TIME, SEEKHTA, TUMHARI, REEL DEKHTA, MERE, AAGE NIKAL, BADAM, APNA, ME TUMLOG, KUCH SEEKH SAKTE, SPEAKX, ISME, TEACHER, BAAT KARKE, 2 HAFTE, FARRATEDAAR, SEEKHGAYE, AB ME HAR, HIGH CLASS, HE, DECIDE, AAPKO, REEL CHALAKE, KARNA, SPEAKX APP, USE KARLE SAMAJ, ME IZZAT PANI
